steps.title: Write the two equations
steps.content:
The two string lengths add to $108$, so
$$x+y=108$$
The value of $x$ is $8$ more than $4$ times $y$, so
$$x=4y+8$$

steps.title: Solve for the pieces
steps.content: Substitute $4y+8$ for $x$. $$(4y+8)+y=108$$ $$5y+8=108$$ $$5y=100$$ $$y=20$$ Then $$x=4(20)+8=88$$ The answer is D.
